content.text: Now I understand the structure. The data has repeating 3-row blocks (Machine/Person/Time in rows 17-19, 20-22, 23-25, 26-28). I need to match machine names from machine rows but sum values from the corresponding time rows (2 rows below).

input.command:
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import openpyxl
from copy import copy

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook('input.xlsx')
ws = wb.active

# Formula approach: for each 3-row block, match machine in row 1, sum time from row 3
# 4 blocks: rows 17-19, 20-22, 23-25, 26-28
# C$9/D$9 = phase (SETUP/RUN), $B10/$B11/$B12 = machine (M1/M2/M3)

formula_template = (
    '=SUMPRODUCT(($I$17>=$C$4)*($J$17<=$C$5)*($L$16:$W$16={phase})*($L$17:$W$17=${machine})*$L$19:$W$19)'
    '+SUMPRODUCT(($I$20>=$C$4)*($J$20<=$C$5)*($L$16:$W$16={phase})*($L$20:$W$20=${machine})*$L$22:$W$22)'
    '+SUMPRODUCT(($I$23>=$C$4)*($J$23<=$C$5)*($L$16:$W$16={phase})*($L$23:$W$23=${machine})*$L$25:$W$25)'
    '+SUMPRODUCT(($I$26>=$C$4)*($J$26<=$C$5)*($L$16:$W$16={phase})*($L$26:$W$26=${machine})*$L$28:$W$28)'
)

cells = {
    'C10': ('C$9', 'B10'),
    'D10': ('D$9', 'B10'),
    'C11': ('C$9', 'B11'),
    'D11': ('D$9', 'B11'),
    'C12': ('C$9', 'B12'),
    'D12': ('D$9', 'B12'),
}

for cell_ref, (phase_ref, machine_ref) in cells.items():
    formula = formula_template.format(phase=phase_ref, machine=machine_ref)
    ws[cell_ref] = formula

wb.save('output.xlsx')
print("Done. Verifying formulas:")
for cell_ref in cells:
    print(f"  {cell_ref}: {ws[cell_ref].value[:80]}...")
PYEOF

content.text: Let me verify the expected values by computing them manually:

input.command:
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook('input.xlsx', data_only=False)
ws = wb.active

# Manually compute expected values
# Blocks: (machine_row, time_row): (17,19), (20,22), (23,25), (26,28)
# Columns L-W = cols 12-23
# L16:W16 headers: SETUP,RUN,SETUP,RUN,SETUP,RUN,SETUP,RUN,SETUP,RUN,SETUP,RUN
headers = [ws.cell(16, c).value for c in range(12, 24)]
print("Headers:", headers)

blocks = [(17,19), (20,22), (23,25), (26,28)]
machines = ['M1', 'M2', 'M3']
phases = ['SETUP', 'RUN']

for machine in machines:
    for phase in phases:
        total = 0
        for mrow, trow in blocks:
            for c in range(12, 24):
                h = ws.cell(16, c).value
                m = ws.cell(mrow, c).value
                t = ws.cell(trow, c).value
                if h == phase and m == machine and t is not None:
                    # Handle formula cells
                    if isinstance(t, str) and t.startswith('='):
                        t = eval(t[1:].replace('*', '*'))
                    total += t
        print(f"{machine} {phase}: {total}")
PYEOF

| | SETUP (C) | RUN (D) |
|---|---|---|
| M1 (row 10) | 2604 | 2269 |
| M2 (row 11) | 2608 | 1586 |
| M3 (row 12) | 1107 | 1209 |
